description: Read-only path allowlists for skill resource directories. Union the paths for active skills and keep them readable without per-file prompts.

adapter_notes.adapter_expectation: local wrappers should allow read access to skill directories before file-level prompts fire

skills.name: abyss-safe-infra-change
skills.notes: List bundled resources without eager reads. Local wrappers should allow read access to these directories so scripts, references, and assets do not trigger per-file permission prompts.
